title: cymbopogon melanocarpus
intro: Cymbopogon melanocarpus, also known as Black Lemongrass, is a tropical grass species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its dark purple or black seeds and a strong, citrusy aroma. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which contain compounds like citral and geraniol, that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cymbopogon melanocarpus include relieving stress and anxiety, reducing fever and pain, and supporting digestive and respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Cymbopogon melanocarpus include tea, essential oil, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation, ease digestive issues, and boost the immune system.
